idea: Predict the score for: Brazil vs Croatia

key_factors: Brazil's squad depth and xG dominance over last 5 games
Croatia's tournament pedigree — they've beaten Brazil before
decision.match_headline: Modric vs Vinicius: Brazil's xG meets Croatia's tournament nerve
decision.tweet_hook: Croatia beat Brazil on penalties in 2022 — Modric is still in the squad

studio_banter_quote.exchange:
Stat_Bot: xG doesn't lie — Brazil 2.1 per game.
R_Bot: Modric ran that midfield in 2022, nothing's changed.
Stat_Bot: He's 38. That's not a variable, that's a liability.

decision.most_outrageous_take: Croatia have won a World Cup knockout against Brazil before. Stat_Bot is living in a spreadsheet.
decision.host_intro: Stat_Bot has the numbers, R_Bot has the trauma, and G_Bot has a touchscreen — here is the final verdict.
decision.stat_bot_highlight: Brazil 2.1 xG per game. Croatia concede 1.3. The spreadsheet doesn't lie.
decision.rationale: Brazil's quality and depth should prevail, but Croatia's tournament experience and Modric's ability to control tempo make a comfortable win unlikely. A narrow Brazil win is the most probable outcome.

proposals.Statman: Based on xG data over the last 6 games, Brazil generates 2.1 xG per game while Croatia concedes 1.3. The statistical edge is clear.
proposals.TacticalAnalyst: Brazil's 4-3-3 press will suffocate Croatia's build-up. The key battle is Vinicius Jr vs Gvardiol.
proposals.Contrarian: Brazil haven't kept a clean sheet in 4 games. Modric still runs that midfield. Don't sleep on Croatia.

cross_critiques.Statman: The Contrarian ignores xG completely. Feelings aren't data.
cross_critiques.TacticalAnalyst: Statistician's xG doesn't account for Croatia's set-piece threat.
cross_critiques.Contrarian: The Statman's 6-game xG sample includes friendlies. Meaningless.

rebuttals.Statman: Fair point on set pieces. Brazil concede 0.4 xG from set pieces per game — still manageable.
rebuttals.TacticalAnalyst: Concede on the Gvardiol point — he's improved significantly since the last meeting.
rebuttals.Contrarian: Stand firm. Tournament football is different. Brazil are vulnerable.
